description_long: This is a female adult pedestrian with a slender build, standing upright with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. She is dressed in a fitted, long-sleeve top and a short skirt, paired with opaque tights and heeled shoes. Her attire is simple and modern, suitable for an urban environment. The figure has straight, shoulder-length hair that frames her face and falls naturally down her back. The overall appearance is clean and stylized, with smooth surfaces and minimal textural detail. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the clothing fits closely to the body.
description: A slender adult woman in a fitted long-sleeve top, short skirt, tights, and heeled shoes, standing in a T-pose with straight, shoulder-length hair.
description_view_0: Front view showing the facial features, fitted top, short skirt, tights, and heeled shoes with arms extended.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the straight fall of the hair, and the silhouette of the clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, hair length, and the fit of the clothing from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the profile and the straight posture.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeve fitted top, short skirt, opaque tights, heeled shoes
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
